name: mul_self_nonneg
statement: theorem mul_self_nonneg (a : α) [LinearOrderedRing α] : 0 ≤ a * a

name: div_add_div_same
statement: theorem div_add_div_same (a b c : α) [Field α] (hc : c ≠ 0) : a / c + b / c = (a + b) / c

name: Continuous.comp
statement: theorem Continuous.comp [TopologicalSpace α] [TopologicalSpace β] [TopologicalSpace γ] {g : β → γ} {f : α → β} (hg : Continuous g) (hf : Continuous f) : Continuous (g ∘ f)

name: HasDerivAt.add
statement: theorem HasDerivAt.add {f g : ℝ → ℝ} {f' g' x : ℝ} (hf : HasDerivAt f f' x) (hg : HasDerivAt g g' x) : HasDerivAt (fun x => f x + g x) (f' + g') x
